workflow: Workflow B — Direct keyword → page → generate (Template HR-A country guides + HR-E treatment page)
instructions: Run steps 1→5 for each page. Treatment page first, then country guides.
Copy keyword id from step 1 into step 2. Copy page id from step 2 into steps 3–5.

body.keyword: what is hair restoration fue dhi
body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template HR-E (~1,800 words). Medically reviewed entity page. REQUIRED H2s: (1) What Is Hair Restoration?, (2) How FUE Works, (3) How DHI Works, (4) FUT Strip Method, (5) Graft Counts, (6) Success Rates and Results Timeline, (7) Why Patients Travel Abroad, (8) What MedCover Patients Report, (9) Where Available, (10) Glossary, (11) FAQ, (12) External Resources. Schema: MedicalProcedure, HowTo. requiresMedicalReviewer: true. Link to all country guides.

body.title: What Is Hair Restoration? FUE, DHI, and FUT Explained
body.metaTitle: Hair Restoration Explained — FUE, DHI, FUT Guide | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Hair restoration covers FUE, DHI, and FUT techniques. Learn how grafts work, what results to expect, and why patients travel abroad for hair transplants.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template HR-A (~1,500 words). Turkey is the global hair transplant capital. REQUIRED H2s per Template Registry HR-A. Cost €1,500–€3,500. Istanbul is primary city. Link to /costs/hair-restoration-turkey-cost-2026, /guides/turkey/istanbul-hair-restoration-guide, /treatments/hair-restoration.
